topic: How to create a Gmail account from scratch

inputs.topic: How to create a Gmail account from scratch

lesson.teacherObjective: After this lesson, you will be able to create a Gmail account from scratch and reach your inbox ready to use.
lesson.teacherExplanation:
Today we are going to learn how to create a Gmail account. Email is a formal way to send messages for school, jobs, and business. It is not the same as WhatsApp, but it is also easy to use once you learn the steps.

A good email address uses your real name. It should look neat and professional. If you use a nickname, it can look careless to a school, a customer, or an employer. You also need a strong password that other people cannot guess. After that, Google may ask for extra details like a phone number, your birth date, and your agreement to the terms. These screens help protect your account and finish setup.

Inkify, run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, uses email to send quotes and invoices to customers in a clear and professional way. A customer may first ask on WhatsApp, but the email gives a written record that is easy to save. This is why students need to know how email works before they leave school. In today’s task, you will create your own Gmail account and make sure it opens to the inbox.
teacherDiscussionQuestions: Where in your life could an email help more than WhatsApp?
What name would you choose for an email address that looks professional?
Why would a local business in KwaZulu-Natal want a clear email record?
lesson.teacherLocalExample: Inkify, run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, uses email to send quotes and invoices to customers. The customer can first ask on WhatsApp, then receive a clear email for record keeping. This shows why email matters for school, jobs, and local business.
teacherTimeGuide: 5 min: write board points, students copy
lesson.taskTitle: How to Create a Gmail Account
lesson.taskIntro: You will have a new Gmail account that opens to your inbox and is ready to use.
lesson.taskReflection: You now have a Gmail account. Write about one real time in the next few months when you could use this email for school, a job application, or a customer, and explain what kind of message you would send.

steps.teach: Start on your phone home screen. Look for the Play Store icon and tap it to open
At the top of the Play Store, you will see a search bar. Tap it, type Gmail, and
The Gmail app page shows the app name, icon, and a button. Tap Install and wait
After Gmail finishes installing, the button changes to Open. Tap Open in Play St
When Gmail opens for the first time, you may see a screen that says Welcome to G

lesson.teacherPlanHTML:
Learning Objective

Create a Gmail Account

After this lesson, you will be able to create a Gmail account from scratch and reach your inbox ready to use.

✏ Write on the Board
Write these before class starts — students copy them down
  • Email is formal business tool
  • Use your real name
  • Username shows who you are
  • Choose a strong password
  • Check inbox after setup

2Explain to Students

Read this aloud — then explain in your own words

Today we are going to learn how to create a Gmail account. Email is a formal way to send messages for school, jobs, and business. It is not the same as WhatsApp, but it is also easy to use once you learn the steps.

A good email address uses your real name. It should look neat and professional. If you use a nickname, it can look careless to a school, a customer, or an employer. You also need a strong password that other people cannot guess. After that, Google may ask for extra details like a phone number, your birth date, and your agreement to the terms. These screens help protect your account and finish setup.

Inkify, run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, uses email to send quotes and invoices to customers in a clear and professional way. A customer may first ask on WhatsApp, but the email gives a written record that is easy to save. This is why students need to know how email works before they leave school. In today’s task, you will create your own Gmail account and make sure it opens to the inbox.

3Discussion Questions

  1. 1Where in your life could an email help more than WhatsApp?
  2. 2What name would you choose for an email address that looks professional?
  3. 3Why would a local business in KwaZulu-Natal want a clear email record?

4Local Example

Inkify, run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, uses email to send quotes and invoices to customers. The customer can first ask on WhatsApp, then receive a clear email for record keeping. This shows why email matters for school, jobs, and local business.
Time Guide — 30 minutes
5 minwrite board points, students copy
15 minteacher explains
10 minclass discussion
